SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-21-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON WINGATE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCESS: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON WINGATE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
